headline: DELL's Strong Partner Network Drives ISG Growth: What's Ahead?
summary: Dell's ISG revenues surge 181% to $29B on AI partnerships, while total revenues rise 88% as AI server demand and backlog fuel a strong growth outlook.

headline: Alan Trefler, Pega CEO: A Fortt Knox Update
summary: Pegasystems Founder & CEO Alan Trefler joins Jon Fortt to position Pega's Blueprint AI as the industry's answer to the token-cost volatility roiling agentic AI rollouts. Trefler frames Blueprint as a 'test kitchen' that lets enterprises pre-design hyper-efficient workflows with predictable outputs AND predictable costs — versus frontier models burning tokens at Ferrari rates when customers thought they were buying SUV economics. A workflow-first reply to LLM unit-economics chaos.
